text:
Yasuda (ヤスダ, Yasuda) is a former performer in Moritonio's traveling circus company. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Appearance

Yasuda has two distinctive black marks below and at the corners of both his eyes. He wears a dark-colored bandana that covers most of his hair. He possibly has facial hair on his chin. 

Personality

Yasuda is irascible and quick to lose his temper, yelling at Hisoka after Kishita's injury and trying to hit him with a pin during their juggling performance. He is also quick to back down, quietly leaving the Moritonio Troupe after Hisoka outperforms him at the Bar Jack Princess Hotel. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

Although he isn't shown in detail, it's assumed that he performed the juggling act with Kishita in the first Moritonio Troupe performance that Hisoka watched. Later, after Kishita breaks his ankle, Yasuda is seen by his side checking on him. Hisoka offers to take Kishita's place, and Yasuda wonders if Hisoka plans to perform card magic on stage. When Hisoka confidently replies that he can perform Kishita's juggling act, Yasuda becomes upset and begins to threaten him, causing Moritonio to hold him back. After Hisoka easily juggles the pins, Yasuda grits his teeth and angrily tells Hisoka to perform the act. As Hisoka puts on his makeup, Yasuda says to himself that he will make a fool of Hisoka on stage and break his nose. 

At the Bar Jack Princess Hotel, as he juggles the pins with Hisoka during their performance, Yasuda can't believe that he's copying the routine perfectly, saying that it took him 12 years. He becomes angry and hurls two pins toward Hisoka, using a new trick that he only practiced with Kishita. He smiles and tells Hisoka to try and catch them, which Hisoka easily does. Yasuda is left stunned and says that he did it with just his reflexes, realizing that Hisoka read his movements instantly. He then drops a pin, and several audience members comment on his mistake. It's stated that after the group's performance, Yasuda quietly left the Troupe and never stepped foot on a stage again. 

Abilities & Powers

Yasuda is a skilled juggler in the Moritonio Troupe. During a discussion with Hisoka, Abaki reveals that none of the Troupe members besides herself had enough potential to learn Nen.
